response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software engineering experience and demonstrates deep technical versatility, including contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling. However, his background leans heavily toward full-stack and systems development without clear evidence of recognized AI expertise, entrepreneurial contributions within larger organizations, or measurable impact in AI-powered product development—key factors for this role. His current role at re:cinq aligns closest with the job's focus, but prior experience lacks the AI specialization or strategic leadership depth typically expected at this level.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack and systems engineering experience with diverse tech stacks
Direct involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, agentic workflows)
Strong open-source contributions and entrepreneurial experience with GISCollective
concerns: Limited evidence of recognized AI expertise or AI-powered product development
No clear entrepreneurial experience within larger organizations
No PhD or advanced AI-related degree; minimal cloud/AI platform strategy focus

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and AI-powered product development
Entrepreneurial or startup experience within larger organizations
Diverse engineering experience with systems-level contributions
